concept.name: grid-template-columns
concept.explain:
The 'grid-template-columns' property defines the number and width of the columns in the grid.
The value is a space-separated-list, where each value defines the width of the respective column.
Common values are pixels (100px), percentages (20%), fr unit (1fr), auto. You can use a mix of values to set the column widths.
repeat() function is used to repeat a set of columns or rows in a grid ‘repeat(3, 60px)'.
Example: grid-template-columns: 150px repeat(5, 60px);

Keep the car in column 1, row 2 and resize column tracks so it fully fills the highlighted wide bay.

ui.prompt: Keep the car in column 1, row 2 and resize column tracks so it fully fills the highlighted wide bay.
hints: Keep .car placement unchanged and adjust only the track widths.

entities.baseCss: background: rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.22); outline: 2px dashed rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.8); border-radius: 10px; min-width: 180px; justify-self: start;

concept.name: grid-template-rows
concept.explain:
The 'grid-template-rows' property defines the number and height of the rows in the grid.
The value is a space-separated-list, where each value defines the height of the respective row.
Common values are pixels (100px), percentages (20%), fr unit (1fr), auto. You can use a mix of values to set the row heights.
repeat() function is used to repeat a set of columns or rows in a grid ‘repeat(3, 60px)'.
Example: grid-template-rows: 60px 150px repeat(4, 60px);

Keep the car in column 3, row 2 and resize row tracks so it fully fills the highlighted tall bay.

ui.prompt: Keep the car in column 3, row 2 and resize row tracks so it fully fills the highlighted tall bay.
hints: Leave .car grid-column and grid-row as they are.

entities.baseCss: background: rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.22); outline: 2px dashed rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.8); border-radius: 10px; min-height: 170px; align-self: start;

concept.name: combine columns and rows
concept.explain:
Use both 'grid-template-columns' and 'grid-template-rows' to size one parking bay in both directions.
Keep the car in column 2, row 2 and resize both column and row tracks to match the larger highlighted bay.

ui.prompt: Keep the car in column 2, row 2 and resize both column and row tracks to match the larger highlighted bay.

entities.baseCss: background: rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.22); outline: 2px dashed rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.8); border-radius: 10px; min-width: 150px; min-height: 150px; justify-self: start; align-self: start;
